title: Format a date string as YYYY-MM-DD
scenario: Given a date string in the format MM/DD/YYYY, convert it to YYYY-MM-DD format using a JavaScript date function.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the JavaScript code meets the specified constraints (uses the Date object, under 50 characters).
Check if the JavaScript function correctly converts the date string from MM/DD/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD format.
Assess if the JavaScript code is syntactically correct.
